evidence: Tauri app configuration and CI Windows build smoke are present, and pnpm build passed. However G006 cannot be completed on this host: cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml and pnpm tauri:build both fail during native Tauri compilation because pkg-config cannot find glib-2.0/gobject-2.0/gio-2.0. sudo -n true requires interactive authentication, so the agent cannot install Linux Tauri prerequisites. Evidence: .omx/ultragoal/evidence/08-windows-packaging.md.
